Back to Examples

Happy Retirement! 🌴

A sample retirement wishes board

"Happy Retirement! You have been a pillar of strength and wisdom for this company. May your next chapter be filled with relaxation, travel, and joy! 🏖️"

A
Ajay Devgn
🎥 Video Message

"Wishing you a wonderful retirement! Enjoy the endless weekends. 🌅"

K
Kajol Mukherjee

"It’s hard to imagine the office without your energy and humor! Thank you for the countless memories and for always leading by example. Have an amazing retirement! 🌟"

R
Ranveer Singh
🎤 Voice Note

"Congratulations on your well-deserved retirement. You will be missed! 💜"

D
Deepika Padukone

"Cheers to your retirement! After all these years of hard work, it's finally time to kick back and enjoy the fruits of your labor. Best wishes on your new journey."

H
Hrithik Roshan

"Happy Retirement! I hope your days are filled with family, fun, and zero alarms. ⏰"

K
Katrina Kaif

"You have inspired so many of us throughout your career. Your legacy here will last a very long time. Wishing you a healthy, happy, and fulfilling retirement! 🏆"

A
Aamir Khan

"Enjoy the freedom! Happy Retirement. 🦋"

J
Juhi Chawla

"It’s been an absolute privilege working alongside you. Wishing you the best as you step into this exciting new phase of life. You've earned it!"

S
Shah Rukh Khan

"Happy Retirement! May your coffee be hot and your days be long and peaceful. ☕"

R
Rani Mukerji

"Congratulations on retiring! Now the real fun begins. Go out there and conquer your bucket list!"

S
Salman Khan

"Wishing you an active and blissful retirement! 🧘‍♀️"

S
Shilpa Shetty

"Thank you for all your hard work and dedication over the decades. You’ve set a standard that will be tough to follow. Have a fantastic retirement!"

A
Akshay Kumar

"Happy Retirement! Enjoy every single moment of your free time. 🌸"

R
Raveena Tandon

"It won't be the same without your jokes and smiles. We'll miss you dearly. Wishing you all the best!"

G
Govinda Ahuja

"Happy Retirement! You deserve every bit of happiness. 🎈"

K
Karisma Kapoor

"Congratulations! I hope retirement brings you the chance to do everything you’ve always wanted to do but didn't have the time for."

S
Saif Ali Khan

"Wishing you joy and relaxation. Happy Retirement! ✨"

S
Sonali Bendre

"Your contributions to the team and company have been immense. Thank you for your service and leadership. Have a grand retirement, my friend!"

S
Sunil Dutt

"Happy Retirement! You will be missed forever. 🌺"

M
Madhubala Dehlvi
